ResxToJson2.CLI 0.0.7
Copyright (C) 2026 keenjus

  -l, --defaultLanguage          (Default: en) Default language of the root
                                 resource

  -s, --separator                (Default: _) Separator used to create nested
                                 structure

  -o, --outDir                   (Default: localization) Directory where to
                                 output generated files

  -n, --nested                   Creates nested structure of resource keys

  --prettify                     (Default: false) Output a readable json

  --noCamelCase                  (Default: false) Disable camel casing of nested
                                 keys

  --noEmit                       Disable file emitting

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

  Root resource file (pos. 0)    Required. Path to the resource file
